name: Beef Wellington Bites
instructions: Sear beef tenderloin cubes in a hot pan until browned on all sides. Let cool.
Spread mushroom duxelles over squares of puff pastry.
Place a beef cube on each square, wrap tightly, and brush with egg wash.
Bake at 200°C for 15-20 minutes until golden brown.

name: Wagyu Beef with Holy Basil & Chili
instructions: Pound chili and garlic together. Sliced wagyu beef into bite-sized pieces.
Heat oil in a wok, fry chili and garlic until fragrant.
Add beef and stir-fry quickly on high heat.
Season with fish sauce and oyster sauce, then toss in holy basil and serve.

name: Slow-Cooked Beef Stew
instructions: Coat beef chunks in flour and sear until brown.
Sauté onions, carrots, and celery in the same pot.
Add red wine, beef stock, and herbs. Return beef to the pot.
Simmer on low heat for 2.5 to 3 hours until beef is tender.

name: Honey Garlic Roasted Chicken
instructions: Season chicken thighs with salt and pepper.
In a bowl, mix honey, soy sauce, and garlic.
Sear chicken in a pan until skin is crispy, then add sauce.
Roast at 190°C until fully cooked and glaze is sticky.

name: Lemon Cream Sauce Chicken
instructions: Dredge chicken breast in flour and pan-fry until golden.
In the same pan, melt butter and whisk in heavy cream and lemon juice.
Simmer until thickened, then return chicken to the pan.
Garnish with lemon slices and parsley.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 30 minutes.
Grill or sear chicken until charred.
Simmer tomato puree, cream, and garam masala in a pan.
Add chicken to the sauce and cook for 10 more minutes.

name: Garlic Butter Shrimp Scampi
instructions: Boil linguine until al dente.
Sauté shrimp in butter and olive oil until pink.
Add garlic and lemon juice, toss with pasta.
Finish with fresh parsley and red pepper flakes.

name: Steamed Sea Bass with Lime
instructions: Clean sea bass and place on a steaming plate.
Steam for 15-20 minutes until cooked through.
Mix lime juice, fish sauce, garlic, and chili in a bowl.
Pour dressing over the hot fish and garnish with cilantro.

name: Seafood Paella
instructions: Sauté onions and peppers in a paella pan.
Add rice and saffron stock, simmer without stirring.
Arrange mussels, shrimp, and squid on top of the rice.
Cook until liquid is absorbed and rice is tender.

name: Classic Caesar Salad
instructions: Tear Romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces and place in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together garlic, mustard, lemon juice, and olive oil to make the dressing.
Toss the lettuce with the dressing until every leaf is well coated.
Top with crunchy croutons and a generous amount of shaved Parmesan cheese before serving.

name: Crispy Tofu Larb
instructions: Dice tofu and deep fry until crispy. Drain oil.
Mix lime juice, soy sauce, chili flakes, and toasted rice powder.
Toss crispy tofu with the dressing, shallots, and mint.
Serve with fresh cabbage or sticky rice.

name: Roasted Cauliflower Steak
instructions: Cut cauliflower into 1-inch thick steaks.
Brush with olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Roast at 200°C for 20 minutes until edges are charred.
Serve with chimichurri sauce or tahini dressing.

name: Basque Burnt Cheesecake
instructions: Mix cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
Add eggs, heavy cream, and vanilla. Mix well.
Fold in flour. Pour into a lined baking tin.
Bake at 220°C for 25-30 minutes until top is dark brown.

name: Butterfly Pea Mango Sticky Rice
instructions: Soak sticky rice in butterfly pea water for 3 hours, then steam.
Mix coconut milk, sugar, and salt over low heat.
Fold coconut milk into cooked rice and let sit for 20 minutes.
Serve with fresh sliced mango and toasted mung beans.

name: Dark Chocolate Lava Cake
instructions: Melt dark chocolate and butter together.
Whisk egg and sugar, then combine with chocolate mixture.
Fold in flour and pour into greased ramekins.
Bake at 200°C for 10-12 minutes. Serve warm.
